rulings.Case Title: HANH TRUONG VS. RAYMOND WONG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Enforcement Of The Residential Purchase Agreement Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 1, DEFENDANT RAYMOND WONG'S Motion For Enforcement Of The Residential Purchase Agreement Pursuant To The Settlement Agreement, Or Alternatively For The Rescission Of The Entire Settlement Agreement Due To Continued Nonperformance By Plaintiff Hearing Required. By no later than 8:30 a.m. Plaintiff to provide the following: (1) DBI document Plaintiff claims is necessary for Defendant to sign; (2) evidence of the date and time this document has been previously provided to the Defendant; and (3) evidence that Defendant refused to execute the document after receipt of the document. Supplemental filing shall not include any argument. The format of the filing shall be similar in form to: (1) Ex A; (2) included in September x, yyyy e-mail from A to B. Ex. B; (3) included in September xx, yyyy e-mail from B to A. Ex. C. If no document or evidence that the document has been previously provided to the defendant can be provided, supplemental filing shall so state, e.g. (1) none; (2) none: (3) none. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RICHARD KIWATA
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Confirm Sale Of Real Property
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 2, OTHER GERARD KEENA II'S Motion To Confirm Sale Of Real Property is GRANTED. No opposition filed. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: VALMI ASSOCIATES VS. KRISTIN KRAMER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 3, PLAINTIFF VALMI ASSOCIATES' Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Interrogatories And For Monetary Sanctions is Off calendar per agreement of the parties. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ABIGAIL PER LEE VS. JEFFREY ANKER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 4, PLAINTIFF ABIGAIL LEE'S Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Proof of Service on file indicated electronic service on October 1, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SOLANGE ELIZABETH CARCAMO PACHECO ET AL VS. SIC-MCM 825 POST STREET, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 5, DEFENDANTS SIC-MCM GP, LLC, 825 POST STREET, L.P., MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., NEVO MOSSER's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts showing that landlord collected rent, increased rent, or issued a three day notice to pay rent or quit after a substandard condition of which a public officer notified the landlord remained unabated for 35 days. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: SOLANGE ELIZABETH CARCAMO PACHECO ET AL VS. SIC-MCM 825 POST STREET, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 5, DEFENDANTS SIC-MCM GP, LLC, 825 POST STREET, L.P., MOSSER COMPANIES, INC., NEVO MOSSER'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED in part and MOOT in part. Motion is moot as to the request for statutory damages in light of the ruling on demurrer. Motion is denied as to the request for punitive damages, allegations are sufficient. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS C. O'KANE ET AL VS. WALGREEN'S INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 6, PLAINTIFFS THOMAS O'KANE, SHARON O'KANE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS is OFF CALENDAR. Defendants to file Amended Answers pursuant to stipulation no later than noon on October 21, 2020. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 4160-64 25TH STREET, LLC VS. PAUL MADGWICK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT / Notice Of Motion & Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 7, DEFENDANTS PAUL MADGWICK, GLEN STROUD'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is transferred to department 304 be heard on October 23, 2020 by the honorable Anne-Christine Massullo at 9:15 a.m. per the order of the presiding judge =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL D. SPENCER VS. YAKI NELSON-BROWN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 8, DEFENDANT YAKINI NELSON-BROWN'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. Given the timing of the filing of the complaint, allegation regarding nuisance are not irrelevant or improper under Emergency Rule 1. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL D. SPENCER VS. YAKI NELSON-BROWN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 8, DEFENDANT YAKINI NELSON-BROWN'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on termination of license. Demurrer is not proper to a part of a cause of action. Furthermore, allegations regarding nuisance in the Complaint do not appear to form the basis for unlawful detainer and are alleged for the purpose of Emergency Rule 1. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: QIAN JU ZHANG VS. ALBERT DICK FAY NG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for October, 21, 2020, Line 9 DEFENDANT ALBERT NG'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. =(501/CFH)
